title: Cyclophorus sarasinorum

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf structure and reproductive habits. Within the phylum Marchantiophyta, Cyclophorus sarasinorum is further classified as part of the class Marchantiopsida. The class Marchantiopsida is then divided into several orders, with Cyclophorus sarasinorum belonging to the order Marchantiales. At the family level, it is classified as part of the family Marchantiaceae.
